narrative:
Wills Township has 999 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
